title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 27 - 2017: Roman Timeline

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder while high, discussing his work on a 'Roman Timeline' project spanning a thousand years. He mentions listening to Strabo for geographical research, doing his taxes (and receiving a return over $1000), visiting his mom, and someone coming to look at his car.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: it's a mind-fucker and he doesn't recommend others look at it yet
couldn't deal with not smoking weed at this time in his life

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder V-log. It's April 27th, 2017, so I'm taking some time off from
Work and I was working in my room all day long and then I came out here recently. I'm
Pretty high right now. Yeah, I couldn't deal with not being smoking weed at this time in
My life because this Roman timeline is super, it's a mind fucker and I don't recommend anybody
Looking at it now because they don't fuck your mind. But yeah, I'm just adding stuff.
Well, I'm doing everything. I'm just building it. Yeah, so I just borrowed, or somebody gave
Me some weed, so I'll probably buy some more when this runs out. But I'm listening to Strava.
I've been listening to Strava for like the last three days. He's got a lot of information,
Geographical stuff. So it's appropriate for me to be listening to. So yeah, I'm working
On the Boulder Rum, or the Roman timeline. Just everything, all of it together at the
Same time, the whole thousand years. And what else? Listening to Strava. And I have nothing
Else to say. I was over at my mom's house yesterday working, helping her with some stuff
Or hanging out. And I'm going to go there tomorrow to help her out with some things.
Oh, that's what I was doing today. I was doing taxes. I had to do my taxes again. So, because
I forgot to do the taxes, complete them. And that's what I did for a little bit. But I got
Tax return already in the mail yesterday, and it was like over a thousand bucks. So, that's
Cool. Oh, and yes, this morning somebody came to look at my car, but they didn't want to get
It because it was too beat up. Oh, here I'll go now.
